name: hook-trace-storage-policy
title: Hook trace 存储策略收口
description: 收敛 HookTrace 的 durable 存储策略，减少空 hook/no-op hook 对 session event 仓储和回放的污染，并为无有效 hook 的触发路径建立 skip 机制。
creator: codex-agent
notes: Implementation in progress. Follow prd/design/implement and keep storage disposition authoritative in backend.
